toast.example: Service-driven toast notifications using ngx-toastr with a restrained visual style aligned with the rest of the library.

success.message: The record was saved successfully and is now available to the team.
success.title: Record saved

info.message: The synchronization process started and will finish in the background.
info.title: Synchronization started

warning.message: There are pending changes that have not been saved yet.
warning.title: Unsaved changes

error.message: The request could not be completed. Please try again later.
error.title: Something went wrong
